features: CARE FOR FIRST TEETH: Give first smiles a great start with our Colgate Kids Toothbrush that’s made for babies and toddlers aged 0-2 years.
EXTRA SOFT BRISTLES: Our baby toothbrush has been specially designed with extra soft bristles for an effective, gentle clean of your little one’s very first teeth.
SMALL BRUSH HEAD: The extra soft toothbrush for kids has a small head that’s created for little mouths and comes with a non-slip handle that’s perfect for tiny hands to hold when they’re ready.
TOOTHPASTE GUIDE: Comes with inner blue coloured bristles to show you how much toothpaste to put on this baby toothbrush.

OPTIMAL ORAL CARE: For the optimal oral care routine for little smiles, use this kids’ toothbrush with Colgate First Smiles toothpaste that contains the dentist recommended amount of fluoride for your baby’s first teeth.
PLEASE NOTE: This toothbrush will be either pink, blue or yellow.
description: Product Description Give first smiles a great start with the Colgate Kids Toothbrush that’s made for babies and toddlers aged 0-2 years. This baby toothbrush has been specially designed with extra soft bristles for an effective, gentle clean of your little one’s very first teeth when they start to come in. The extra soft toothbrush has a small head that’s created for little mouths and comes with a non-slip handle that’s perfect for tiny hands to hold when they’re ready to start their brushing journey by themselves. With inner blue coloured bristles to show you how much toothpaste to put on this infant toothbrush, you can be confident you’re doing a great job for little teeth. And for the optimal oral care routine for little smiles, you can use this kids’ toothbrush with Colgate First Smiles toothpaste that contains the dentist recommended amount of fluoride for your baby’s first teeth. Remember, you should always supervise kids under 8 while they’re brushing their teeth. This toothbrush will be either pink, blue or yellow. Ingredients Contains Colgate Kids Toothbrush Safety Warning Supervise a child under the age of 3 while brushing his teeth to prevent fouling or inhaling small parts of the toothbrush. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ. See more
